moduleName: Trade and Orientation, Occupational Safety & Health, Hand tools and their uses
moduleDescription: Covers familiarization with the ITI system, foundational safety protocols, first aid, and the identification and use of basic hand tools.
learningOutcome: Perform basic workshop operations using suitable tools for fitting, riveting, drilling etc. observing suitable care & safety following safety precautions.

moduleName: Basics of AC and Electrical Cables, Single range meters
moduleDescription: Introduces concepts of electric charges, voltage, current, basic AC/DC properties, cable specifications, and the fundamental operation of single range meters.
learningOutcome: Select and perform electrical/ electronic measurement of single range meters and calibrate the instrument.

moduleDescription: Details the construction, specification, charging processes, and maintenance of primary and secondary cells/batteries.
learningOutcome: Test &service different batteries used in electronic applications and record the data to estimate repair cost.

moduleDescription: Explains the classification of electrical measuring instruments, including MC/MI meters, and details the use of tools like CRO/DSO and LCR meters.
learningOutcome: Measure AC/DC using proper measuring instruments and compare the data using standard parameter.

moduleDescription: Covers the block diagram, advantages, and practical applications of Digital Storage Oscilloscopes and function generators.
learningOutcome: Measure the various parameters by DSO and execute the result with standard one.

moduleDescription: Provides knowledge on soldering guns, materials, flux usage, and specifications for various electrical and electronic switches.
learningOutcome: Plan and execute soldering & de-soldering of various electrical components like Switches, PCB & Transformers for electronic circuits.

moduleDescription: Discusses Ohm's law, Kirchhoff's law, and the characteristics, applications, and behaviors of resistors, inductors, capacitors, and relays.
learningOutcome: Test various electronic components using proper measuring instruments and compare the data using standard parameter.

moduleDescription: Explains semiconductor materials, diodes, rectifiers, filter circuits, transformers, and IC-based regulated power supplies.
learningOutcome: Assemble simple electronic power supply circuit and test for functioning.

moduleName: Transistor, Amplifier, Oscillators, Wave shaping circuits
moduleDescription: Details the construction and working of PNP/NPN transistors, various amplifier configurations, oscillators, and clipping/clamping circuits.
learningOutcome: Construct, test and verify the input/output characteristics of various analog circuits.

moduleDescription: Covers the working principles, specifications, and characteristics of FETs, SCRs, TRIACs, DIACs, UJTs, MOSFETs, and IGBTs.
learningOutcome: Plan and construct different power electronic circuits and analyse the circuit functioning.

moduleDescription: Introduces the working principles and applications of optical components like LEDs, IR LEDs, photo diodes, opto-couplers, and LASER diodes.
learningOutcome: Select the appropriate opto electronics components and verify the characteristics in different circuit.

moduleName: Basic Gates, Combinational Circuits, Flip Flops
moduleDescription: Outlines digital signals, number systems, logic gates, combinational logic circuits, encoders/decoders, multiplexers, and flip-flops.
learningOutcome: Assemble, test and troubleshoot various digital circuits.

moduleDescription: Introduces electronic circuit simulation software, teaching how to explore component libraries and utilize testing resources digitally.
learningOutcome: Simulate and analyze the analog and digital circuits using Electronic simulator software.

moduleDescription: Discusses the internal block diagrams, ideal characteristics, configurations, and functional applications of IC 741 Operational Amplifiers and 555 Timers.
learningOutcome: Construct and test different circuits using ICs 741operational amplifiers & ICs 555 linear integrated circuits and execute the result.
